label: Run a PowerShell file (.ps1)
description: Runs a .ps1 script on the Maestro/bench machine and captures its output.

label: Run a Batch file (.bat)
description: Runs a .bat script and captures its output.

label: Run a CMD file (.cmd)
description: Runs a .cmd script and captures its output.

label: Run a Python file (.py)
description: Runs a .py script with the bundled Python and captures its output.

label: Run an executable (.exe)
description: Runs an .exe tool and captures its output.

label: Run a command line
description: Runs a raw command line and captures its output.

label: Run a script, pass args & check output
description: Runs a script with arguments, passes only if the output contains the expected text, and attaches the output.

label: Run a script in a working directory
description: Runs a script with a specific working directory (cwd).

label: DLT via script → match pattern (attach on match)
description: Runs your DLT capture script, then passes/fails by searching the produced .dlt for a pattern and attaches it.

label: DLT via script → attach .dlt
description: Runs your DLT capture script for logging and attaches the produced .dlt file.

label: Run a bench script & attach its log
description: Runs a bench command (e.g. ETFW/power) and attaches a log file it produces.
